name: Lebkuchen (German Honey Cakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix honey, light brown sugar, lemon juice, and lemon rind.
2. Beat in the eggs.
3. Sift together flour, baking soda, nutmeg, cloves, and cinnamon.
4. Add dry ingredients to the egg mixture.
5. Stir in citron and shredded almonds.
6. Let the dough stand at room temperature for one day (covered).
7. Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/2 inch.
8. Cut into decorative shapes using cookie cutters.
9. Place on a greased baking sheet.
10. Bake in an oven set to 400 degrees Fahrenheit until browned.
